title: 2025-09-18 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 12.49
description: Policy pressure tracker for 2025-09-18: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 12.49/100, signaling a low pressure regime as front-end rate pressure and inflation expectations shaped the daily read. See the chart pack, score regime, and what drove the latest reading.
hero_summary: The daily signal helps separate noise from persistent multi-factor stress. On 2025-09-18, the score printed 12.49/100 in the low regime, with front-end rate pressure and inflation expectations doing most of the work.
